speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It was quite damaged." Passes it off to her first mate again and you can see the first mate is kind of the sheepish mousy gentleman who is currently in process of counting all the coins as they come in, he's, like, the on-board accountant and he's just-- "We're good." "Wonderful. Thank you so much for your patronage. Wish you all a fond farewell. Now shoo."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And then how many days were we in--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So ten? So just over 1,000 gold, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you going to write her an IOU?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I'll pay her in gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I hired you all, it's only the right thing, Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm a man of my word.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stand by your side as you pay her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Captain Adella's there with her crew behind her. "It's been an absolute pleasure. Should you require our assistance again, you know where to find us, and if not, we're busy making money elsewhere, fuck off."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She takes the coin purse from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Takes that, hands it to one of her-- her first mate--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Plus 200 for any damages to your ship.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Most of these notes you cannot read. The language you've-- Percival, you recognize the script. A lot of them are written in Abyssal.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, that's a good idea you just had.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was just wrong about, yeah, the city. That's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I don't think we should go charging into the Nine Hells like we did the ocean.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: When you put it like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's try to prepare better.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We just got here. But yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you're pulling some of the notes you had gathered-- what languages do you guys speak?
